_comment: TQNN MCP Server — per-employee login accounts. Checked at the OAuth consent screen AND on every subsequent MCP request (live revocation). To revoke someone immediately, set their status to "disabled" — takes effect on their very next request, no restart needed. Generate password_hash values with: node tqnn_mcp_hash_password.js <password>

example_user.label: Example User — replace or remove this entry
